steps.title: Identify both speed bounds
steps.content: The speed varied between $45$ miles per hour and $60$ miles per hour, so it was at least $45$ and at most $60$.

steps.title: Write the compound inequality
steps.content:
The lower and upper bounds must both be included.
$$45\le s\le 60$$
Choices with only one inequality miss one side of the range. The answer is D.
